title: Retain and retrieve a Report Snapshot
preconditions: A complete coherent Insight Report exists for retention, or the caller provides a stable retained identity or bounded list filter; owner-only storage protections and compatibility checks pass.
postconditions: Exactly one immutable snapshot exists for one successful logical retention request; retrieval and listing do not change it.
main_flow: 1. INSIGHTS validates actor attribution, retention request identity, report completeness, provenance, content fingerprint, permissions, and limits. 2. It atomically appends one immutable Report Snapshot containing the bounded report and required provenance, not canonical upstream rows. 3. An identical retry returns the prior logical snapshot; a changed logical request under the same identity conflicts. 4. Get returns one exact immutable snapshot; list returns bounded metadata-first history in deterministic order, with report payload included only when explicitly requested.
alt_flows: Unsafe storage permissions, incompatible schema, incomplete provenance, invalid fingerprint, or resource limit returns failure before persistence.
The same retention identity with different normalized input returns conflict and creates no duplicate.
Unknown report identity returns Not Found.
List bounds exceeded returns validation failure rather than truncating silently.
Commit, cancellation, or crash failure leaves no partial snapshot and preserves prior history.
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The owner explicitly chooses to preserve an Insight Report as durable evidence or later retrieves or lists retained reports.","status":"draft"}
